steps.title: Use Lucia's teaching insight
steps.content: Lucia recognizes the penciled suggestions as a bad sign because she knows from teaching that pencil can soften the indignity of corrections. She understands the criticism as indirect and tactful, not openly harsh.

steps.title: Reject invented reactions
steps.content: Choice A overstates the praise in the marked pages. Choice B invents gratitude and calls the criticism direct. Choice D invents disagreement with the suggested changes. The answer is C.
